concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文明确列出了5条假设，包括数据范围、异常年份解释、犯罪来源等，为后续建模奠定基础。
concepts_used.source_excerpt:
Assumptions
- The high school enrollment rate only refers to high schools within the city.
- The incidences of violence refer only to those that occurred within the city.
- That there was a disease outbreak or natural disaster in the year 2000...
- Empirical evidence shows that normally unemployment rate correlates with crime rates, but since there is no correlation in this city, we can assume that most of the crime comes from gangs of youth.
- This city is in the United States and hence eligible for federal funding.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 对多组变量进行线性回归拟合，计算R²值判断相关性，如犯罪率与失业率、毕业率等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The resulting linearization of the data was: y=(604.52x) + 8.3106. However, the r^2 value was .04127... The correlation here was very strong as the r^2 value was .77014 for this equation: y= -3*10^5x + .9447

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 使用R²（决定系数）评估线性回归模型的拟合优度，判断变量间相关性强弱。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: the r^2 value was .04127, showing that this linearization was a very bad fit... With an r^2 value of .77014... With an r^2 value of .52033, there is a moderately good inversely proportional relationship...

concepts_used.title: Pearson 相关系数
concepts_used.how_used: 通过散点图和线性回归分析多个变量与犯罪率之间的相关性，如失业率、毕业率、辍学率、假释违规率等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To see if there was a relationship between crime rate and unemployment rate, we graphed the two vs each other... Then, to see if there was a correlation of unemployment rate and graduation rate, we graphed them... This is the correlation between graduation rate and crime rate.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用散点图展示变量间关系，并添加线性趋势线和R²值，直观呈现相关性分析结果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Crime rate vs Unemployment rate (scatter plot with linear trendline and R²)... Graduation Rate vs Crime Rate (scatter plot)... HS D/O Rate vs Crime Rate (scatter plot)...

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 在问题重述部分清晰阐述了建模目的：降低与帮派和暴力相关的犯罪率，并引用数据说明犯罪率上升趋势。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The purpose of this model is to decrease the crime rate relating to gangs and violence in a city. Although the crime rate has decreased from 2000-2006, it has started increasing again. From 2006-2008, the incidence of homicide increased by 78%.
